channel.title: Comments on: Beer America TV on iTunes – Subscribe now!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: David Little
item.dc:creator: David Little
item.description: Ahhh Tequila ... ever tried Cazadores t.b.?

item.title: By: t.b.
item.dc:creator: t.b.
item.description:
Have watched all episodes/blogs. Really enjoy interesting comments on products. Great job guys keep up the good work! All the best, from an ex AB, Labatt employee.
Thanks for the plug Pauly!
I really enjoy Tequila now, specifically Patron Silver!
item.content:encoded:
Have watched all episodes/blogs.
Really enjoy interesting comments on products.
Great job guys keep up the good work!
All the best,
from an ex AB, Labatt employee.

Thanks for the plug Pauly!

I really enjoy Tequila now, specifically Patron Silver!
